title: The Red Detachment of Women
actors: Xijuan Zhu, Xingang Wang, Mei Xiang
plot: In 1930s, Wu Qionghua was a housemaid of Nan-ba-tian, a cruel warlord of a village in Hainan Island, China. Often abused by her master, Qionghua was finally rescued by Hong Changqing, leader of the Red Detachment of Women - a troo...
